rows.description: Computus Dni Rectoris a 2do Die Novembris 1812
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash's description, which accurately reads 'Computus' and 'Die'. Confirmed by visual verification. gpt-5-mini misread 'Computatio' and 'Dec'.
rows.section_header: Computus Dni Rectoris a 2do Die Novembris 1812

rows.notes: This row was entirely missed by gpt-5-mini. gemini-flash attempted to transcribe it as part of a second header row but misread 'itidem' as 'usum Domus' and 'Diem revolutum' as 'revolutionem'. Visual verification confirms 'ad itidem Diem revolutum 1813'.
Selected gemini-flash's description, which accurately reads 'Summaria Recepta'. Visual verification confirms this reading. gpt-5-mini misread 'Summaria' as 'Annua'.

Visual verification confirms 'Money Rents fixed' as a header. gpt-5-mini incorrectly identified it as an entry with an amount (0.3.6) and added 'P.T.'. gemini-flash correctly identified as a header but misread 'Rents fixed' as 'Rentified'.

Selected gemini-flash. Description 'Shenkempton Rectory P. S. S.' and amount '36.-.-' are clearly visible and correct. gpt-5-mini completely misread the description ('Manchester Rectory') and amount ('2.10.-'), indicating a significant misalignment.
rows.english_description: Annual rent from the Shenkempton rectory.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent from the Shenkempton rectory, amounting to £36 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash. Description 'Jesus College' and amount '2.10.-' are clearly visible and correct. gpt-5-mini misread description ('Stowe College') and amount ('0.5.4').
rows.english_description: Fixed rent received from Jesus College.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Fixed rent received from Jesus College, amounting to £2 10s 0d.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash. Description 'Oxfen' and amount '5.4.-' are clearly visible and correct. gpt-5-mini misread description ('Bipton') and amount ('0.6.8').

rows.english_description_with_amount: Fixed rent received from Oxfen, amounting to £5 4s 0d.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Fixed rent for the Lad Lane property paid by Comyns, amounting to £8 8s 0d.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Fixed rent paid by Wilson, amounting to £6 0s 0d.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Fixed rent paid by Pickford, amounting to £1 10s 0d.

rows.notes: Amount '6.-.-' clearly in pounds column (gemini-flash correct). For description, visual verification confirms 'Sedenham', consistent with gemini-flash's initial observation ('appears to be Sedenham'). gpt-5-mini misread description ('Medenham') and amount column.
rows.english_description: Fixed rent received from Sedenham.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Fixed rent received from Sedenham, amounting to £6 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini. Confirmed by visual verification.

Selected gemini-flash. Amounts are in consensus. gemini-flash's interpretation of '12' (visible to the left of the amount columns) as a separate notation, not part of the description or amount, is more accurate to ledger formatting. gpt-5-mini included '12' in the description.

rows.description: Imberzhull Napier to L Day 1/2 Year
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms 'Imberzhull Napier to L Day 1/2 Year'. gemini-flash correctly read 'Imberzhull' and the pence as '0', but misread 'to L Day 1/2 Year' slightly. gpt-5-mini misread 'Imberzhull' as 'Tintinhulle' and the pence amount as '1'.
rows.english_description: Half-yearly payment for Imberzhull from Napier, due at Lady Day.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Half-yearly payment for Imberzhull from Napier, due at Lady Day, amounting to £6 4s ½d.
